market_health.description: High risk environment (Risk-Off). The shift into VIX term structure backwardation and stalled geopolitical negotiations outweigh supply-side relief in energy and fertilizers, signaling a period of acute defensive positioning. VIX is 27.19. Expensive premiums; favor defensive selling or volatility hedges.
market_health.global_thesis: The shift into VIX term structure backwardation and stalled geopolitical negotiations outweigh supply-side relief in energy and fertilizers, signaling a period of acute defensive positioning.

risk_reasons: Portfolio Beta-Weighted Delta (69.57) exceeds neutral bounds.

recommendations.thesis: Speculative play. The shift into VIX term structure backwardation and stalled geopolitical negotiations outweigh supply-side relief in energy and fertilizers, signaling a period of acute defensive positioning. Capped risk on NVDA recovery.
Panic detected (Curve: backwardation). Buying protective convexity as VRP is compressed.
